originContent: # getmic.ro
translatedContent: # getmic.ro

originContent: ![Test](https://github.com/benweissmann/getmic.ro/workflows/Test/badge.svg)
translatedContent: ![测试](https://github.com/benweissmann/getmic.ro/workflows/Test/badge.svg)

originContent: The fastest way to install [Micro](https://micro-editor.github.io/)
translatedContent: 安装 [Micro](https://micro-editor.github.io/) 的最快方式

originContent: ```Bash
translatedContent: ```Bash

originContent: # local install just for your user
translatedContent: # local install just for your user

originContent: curl https://getmic.ro | bash
translatedContent: curl https://getmic.ro | bash
或者，使用 `wget` 替代 `curl`，以及使用任何 `sh` 解释器替代 `bash`：

originContent: Or, using `wget` in place of `curl` and any `sh`ell interpreter in place of `bash`:
```Bash
translatedContent: ```Bash

originContent: # local install just for your user
translatedContent: # local install just for your user

originContent: wget -O- https://getmic.ro | sh
translatedContent: wget -O- https://getmic.ro | sh

originContent: This script will install micro to the directory you're in. To install somewhere else (e.g. /usr/local/bin), cd there and make sure you can write to that directory, e.g. `cd /usr/local/bin; curl https://getmic.ro | sudo sh` like so:
translatedContent: 此脚本将 micro 安装到您当前所在的目录。若要安装到其他位置（例如 /usr/local/bin），请切换到该目录并确保您有写入权限，例如 `cd /usr/local/bin; curl https://getmic.ro | sudo sh`，操作如下：

originContent: ```Bash
translatedContent: ```Bash

originContent: # global install for all users
translatedContent: # global install for all users

originContent: cd /usr/bin
translatedContent: cd /usr/bin

originContent: curl https://getmic.ro | sudo sh
translatedContent: curl https://getmic.ro | sudo sh
该脚本还可以使用 update-alternatives 将 micro 注册为系统文本编辑器。

originContent: This script can also use update-alternatives to register micro as a system text editor.
translatedContent: 例如，这将允许 `crontab -e` 使用 micro 打开 cron 文件。

originContent: For example, this will allow `crontab -e` open the cron file with micro.

translatedContent: 要启用此功能，请定义 `GETMICRO_REGISTER` 变量或使用 URL

originContent: To enable this feature, define the `GETMICRO_REGISTER` variable or use the URL
translatedContent: `https://getmic.ro/r`。请注意，执行此操作时必须将 micro 安装到所有用户都可访问的目录，通常是 /usr/bin：

originContent: `https://getmic.ro/r`. Note that you must install micro to a directory
accessible to all users when doing this, typically /usr/bin:
```Bash
translatedContent: ```Bash

originContent: # global install for all users, registering with update-alternatives
translatedContent: # global install for all users, registering with update-alternatives

originContent: cd /usr/bin
translatedContent: cd /usr/bin

originContent: curl https://getmic.ro/r | sudo sh
translatedContent: curl https://getmic.ro/r | sudo sh

originContent: > Vous ne comprenez pas l'anglais? vous parlez français? **Regardez le [*LISEZ-MOI* français](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/benweissmann/getmic.ro/master/./README.fr.md)!**
translatedContent: > 您不懂英语？您会说法语吗？**请查看[*法语版自述文件*](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/benweissmann/getmic.ro/master/./README.fr.md)！**

originContent: ## Advanced usage
translatedContent: ## 高级用法

originContent: There's a couple other things you can do with getmic.ro. Listed below are environment variables you can choose from:
translatedContent: getmic.ro 还有其他一些用法。下面列出了您可以选择的环境变量：

originContent: * `GETMICRO_HTTP=<COMMAND ...ARGS>`
translatedContent: * `GETMICRO_HTTP=<COMMAND ...ARGS>`

originContent: + Use this command with arguments deliminated by spaces to download files off the internet.
translatedContent: + 使用此命令及空格分隔的参数从互联网上下载文件。

originContent: - It MUST follow redirects (via HTTP Location headers).
translatedContent: - 它必须遵循重定向（通过 HTTP Location 头）。

originContent: - It MUST print the resulting file contents to stdout.
translatedContent: - 它必须将结果文件内容打印到标准输出。

originContent: - It MUST accept the next argument to be the URL of the file to be downloaded
translatedContent: - 它必须接受下一个参数作为要下载的文件 URL。

originContent: - It IS OPTIONAL for the command to also accept a `--header` parameter used for non-essential GitHub authentication fallback shim.
translatedContent: - 命令可选支持 `--header` 参数，用于非必需的 GitHub 身份验证回退。

originContent: + For example, to force using `curl`, do: `curl https://getmic.ro | GETMICRO_HTTP="curl -L" sh`
translatedContent: + 例如，强制使用 `curl`：`curl https://getmic.ro | GETMICRO_HTTP="curl -L" sh`

originContent: + For example, to force using `wget`, do: `wget -O- https://getmic.ro | GETMICRO_HTTP="wget -O-" sh`
translatedContent: + 例如，强制使用 `wget`：`wget -O- https://getmic.ro | GETMICRO_HTTP="wget -O-" sh`

originContent: * `GETMICRO_PLATFORM=[freebsd32 | freebsd64 linux-arm | linux-arm64 | linux32 | linux64 | linux64-static | macos-arm64 | netbsd32 | netbsd64 | openbsd32 | openbsd64 | osx | win32 | win64]`
translatedContent: * `GETMICRO_PLATFORM=[freebsd32 | freebsd64 linux-arm | linux-arm64 | linux32 | linux64 | linux64-static | macos-arm64 | netbsd32 | netbsd64 | openbsd32 | openbsd64 | osx | win32 | win64]`

originContent: + This manually overrides the platform detection mechanism and downloads the binaries for the platform you specify
translatedContent: + 手动覆盖平台检测机制，下载您指定平台的二进制文件

originContent: + One usage of this is specifying `https://getmic.ro | GETMICRO_PLATFORM=linux64-static sh` when using an incompatible libc implementation such as musl.
translatedContent: + 例如在使用不兼容 libc 实现（如 musl）时，可使用 `https://getmic.ro | GETMICRO_PLATFORM=linux64-static sh`

originContent: * `GETMICRO_REGISTER=[y | n]`
translatedContent: * `GETMICRO_REGISTER=[y | n]`

originContent: + Whether to register micro with `update-alternatives` so you can seamlessly use micro as the system text editor.
translatedContent: + 是否通过 `update-alternatives` 注册 micro，使其可作为系统文本编辑器无缝使用。

originContent: - y => yes
translatedContent: - y => 是

originContent: - n => no (the default)
translatedContent: - n => 否（默认）

originContent: + If GETMICRO_REGISTER is defined but the system does not support `update-alternatives`, then this option is silently ignored.
translatedContent: + 如果定义了 GETMICRO_REGISTER 但系统不支持 `update-alternatives`，则该选项会被静默忽略。

originContent: + When enabled, getmicro must be running with sufficient priveledges (typically the root user) to use `update-alternatives`, otherwise getmicro will exit with an error.
translatedContent: + 启用时，getmicro 必须以有足够权限（通常是 root 用户）运行以使用 `update-alternatives`，否则 getmicro 会报错退出。

originContent: + As a shorthand, you can use `https://getmic.ro/r` which defines `GETMICRO_REGISTER=y`.
translatedContent: + 作为简写，您可以使用 `https://getmic.ro/r`，它定义了 `GETMICRO_REGISTER=y`。

originContent: Putting it all together, the following command line would always use wget, always install the linux32 binaries, and always register with `update-alternatives`:
translatedContent: 综合起来，下面的命令行将始终使用 wget，始终安装 linux32 二进制文件，并始终注册到 `update-alternatives`：

originContent: ```Bash
translatedContent: ```Bash

originContent: wget -O- https://getmic.ro | GETMICRO_HTTP="wget -O-" GETMICRO_PLATFORM=linux32 GETMICRO_REGISTER=y sh
translatedContent: wget -O- https://getmic.ro | GETMICRO_HTTP="wget -O-" GETMICRO_PLATFORM=linux32 GETMICRO_REGISTER=y sh

originContent: ### Verify the script checksum
translatedContent: ### 验证脚本校验和

originContent: To verify the script, you can download it and checksum it. The sha256 checksum is `d041f51b97871dc7de1f01879c12a978b074a5acdb6528e884ce8f4c05d2ad35`.
translatedContent: 要验证脚本，您可以下载它并计算校验和。sha256 校验和是 `d041f51b97871dc7de1f01879c12a978b074a5acdb6528e884ce8f4c05d2ad35`。

originContent: ```Bash
translatedContent: ```Bash

originContent: gmcr="$(curl https://getmic.ro)" && [ $(echo "$gmcr" | shasum -a 256 | cut -d' ' -f1) = d041f51b97871dc7de1f01879c12a978b074a5acdb6528e884ce8f4c05d2ad35 ] && echo "$gmcr" | sh
translatedContent: gmcr="$(curl https://getmic.ro)" && [ $(echo "$gmcr" | shasum -a 256 | cut -d' ' -f1) = d041f51b97871dc7de1f01879c12a978b074a5acdb6528e884ce8f4c05d2ad35 ] && echo "$gmcr" | sh
或者，您也可以使用以下手动方法。

originContent: Alternatively, you can use the following manual method.
```Bash
translatedContent: ```Bash

originContent: # 1. Manually verify that this outputs d041f51b97871dc7de1f01879c12a978b074a5acdb6528e884ce8f4c05d2ad35
translatedContent: # 1. Manually verify that this outputs d041f51b97871dc7de1f01879c12a978b074a5acdb6528e884ce8f4c05d2ad35

originContent: curl https://getmic.ro | shasum -a 256
translatedContent: curl https://getmic.ro | shasum -a 256

originContent: # 2. If #1 was successful, then execute getmicro
translatedContent: # 2. If #1 was successful, then execute getmicro

originContent: curl https://getmic.ro | sh
translatedContent: curl https://getmic.ro | sh

originContent: ## Contributing
translatedContent: ## 贡献

originContent: Thank you for contributing! We use the Github pull request workflow: fork this repo, make your changes, and then submit a pull request. There's a couple things you'll need to do to get your PR merged:
translatedContent: 感谢您的贡献！我们使用 Github 的拉取请求工作流：首先 fork 这个仓库，进行修改，然后提交拉取请求。要合并您的 PR，您需要做以下几件事：

originContent: - Make sure all of the tests pass. Github Actions will report test failures on the PR page once you open it.
translatedContent: - 确保所有测试通过。打开 PR 后，Github Actions 会在 PR 页面报告测试失败。

originContent: - If you introduce new behavior, update the Github Actions tests (in [`.github/workflows/test.yml`](https://github.com/benweissmann/getmic.ro/blob/master/.github/workflows/test.yml)) to test that behavior.
translatedContent: - 如果您引入了新行为，请更新 Github Actions 测试（在 [`.github/workflows/test.yml`](https://github.com/benweissmann/getmic.ro/blob/master/.github/workflows/test.yml) 中）以测试该行为。

originContent: - If you introduce new user-facing options or behavior, update the README files to document that behavior (don't translate if you don't know the destination file's language).
translatedContent: - 如果您引入了面向用户的新选项或行为，请更新 README 文件以记录该行为（如果不熟悉目标文件的语言，请勿翻译）。

originContent: If you're not sure how to do any of these things, feel free to open a PR with your work-in-progress and whatever questions you have!
translatedContent: 如果您不确定如何完成上述任何步骤，欢迎提交您的工作进展 PR 并提出您的问题！
